calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Dec-13-2019 Vacated

Notice Of Motion For Protective Order To Limit Written Discovery
Off Calendar Nov-19-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
William E. Gilg, Esg., 650-871-8647, appearing for Plaintiff(s) Robert Alexander et al;
Erin K. Lindberg, Esg, Kronenberg Law, 510-254-5647, appearing for Defendant(s) Guru Sharanam, LLC et al

Consolidated with CGC-18-568522 Robert Alexander et al v. Guru Sharanam et al. (Lead Csae)

Hearing is held. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANTS GURU SHARANAM, LLC, INDRASINH SOLANKI'S Motion For Protective Order To Limit Written Discovery Issued By Plaintiff's. Motion is granted as follows: Plaintiff are given leave to serve one set of the previously served form interrogatories on behalf of all 39 plaintiffs in the consolidated action and 100 requests for admission and 100 special interrogatories to address the subject matter of the discovery that is the subject of the motion. Defendant Guru Sharanam LLC shall have 60 days from service of the discovery to respond.

Order is signed and filed in the lead case CGC-18-568522 Robert Alexander et al v. Guru Sharanam et al.

Judge Pro Tem: Sandford Kingsley; Clerk: William Trupek; Not reported. (302/JPT)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-08-2019 Set For Trial On Dec-16-19 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
